title: Magnetite Block
description: The Magnetite Block is a powerful vacuum block that automatically pulls in dropped items
body: The Magnetite Block is a powerful vacuum block that automatically pulls in dropped items and XP orbs from up to 8 blocks away, converting XP orbs into storable XP bottles. Simply place the block near mob farms, mining areas, or anywhere you want to collect items, and it will continuously attract and store everything in its 27-slot internal inventory. Connect hoppers underneath to automatically extract collected items, turning it into an efficient vacuum chest system for item automation.
